overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from an intersection under elevated highways, past vending machines and benches, along fenced walkways, and emerges toward an open street with a distinctive circular tower ahead. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with neon signage, steam vents, and futuristic vehicles during golden hour lighting.

events.description: red sports car passes through the intersection emitting steam from vents
moving from open intersection into covered sidewalk area under the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk starting from a crosswalk intersection, moving under the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at an urban intersection under a massive elevated highway. A pedestrian with visible cybernetic implants crosses in front of the camera while a red sports car passes through the intersection. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing digital billboards and steam vents, transitioning into a more covered area beneath the highway.

events.description: passing by pedestrians sitting on benches along the wall
approaching corner with construction barriers and striped warning markers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered sidewalk past vending machines and benches where people are sitting against the wall

concrete benches where pedestrians are seated
metal railing along the edge of the walkway
concrete barriers with yellow and black striped warning patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath the highway, the scene features vending machines and benches where pedestrians sit. The lighting is darker under the overpass. The camera approaches a corner with construction barriers, transitioning from the straight walkway to a turning section.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian pathway under highway with metal railings and barriers

events.description: entering fenced walkway section with metal railings and concrete barriers
pedestrians pass close by in opposite direction temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking along the fenced pathway under the highway, passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction near the railings

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking towards camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: rusted metal railings with horizontal bars along the walkway edge
tall concrete wall with metal fencing on top separating walkway from lower levels
glowing neon advertisements visible in the distance under the highway

segments.scene_description: The walkway becomes more enclosed with metal railings and concrete barriers on the left side. Palm trees are visible through gaps in the railing. The camera passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while continuing under the massive highway structure, with neon signs becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning from covered walkway to open urban street with prominent neon signage

events.description: emerging from shadow of overpass into brighter sunlight ahead
approaching open intersection with distinctive circular tower building ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the final section of highway with large neon billboards overhead, approaching an open intersection with a distinctive circular tower ahead

entered.detail: large pink and purple illuminated billboard displaying a samurai character
tall cylindrical building with circular architecture and external structures
multi-story urban buildings with storefronts at street level

segments.scene_description: The final segment walks under the highway with prominent neon billboards overhead, including a large samurai advertisement. The lighting brightens as the camera emerges from the overpass shadow toward an open intersection. A distinctive circular tower dominates the view ahead as the walkway opens up to the broader city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a shadowed urban intersection beneath a massive highway toward a bright, open city street dominated by a circular tower. It begins at a busy crossing where a red sports car and a cybernetic pedestrian pass by, moving forward past digital billboards and steam vents into the darker cover of the overpass. As the camera progresses along the sidewalk, the environment shifts into a more enclosed corridor featuring vending machines, benches, and metal railings with palm trees visible through the gaps. The scene then transitions past construction barriers and oncoming pedestrians, with the overhead lighting gradually brightening as neon signs and a large samurai advertisement come into view. Finally, the camera emerges from the deep shadows of the highway structure into the golden light of a broad intersection, revealing the distinctive circular tower ahead.
